notes.text: This evidence log was generated following sensitive contact: FBI agents on 2026-06-08T03:29:51.555Z
User reported "just got off the line with FBI agents". This log created to document drive contents for protection against potential seizure.
Generated to create a verifiable digital manifest of drive contents. Intended to allow authorities to receive copies/logs instead of seizing original physical media.
